name: Real-Time Code Collaboration Platform
desc: Collaborative code editor built with React, Node.js, Express, Socket.IO, Yjs, Docker, and AWS ECS for low-latency real-time editing.

name: ForgeChat - AI Powered Chat Application
desc: ChatGPT-style AI web application with secure authentication, backend REST APIs, MongoDB schema design, and deployed routing support.

name: Talk-Space - Real-Time Messaging Platform
desc: Real-time messaging platform using React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.IO with JWT authentication and message delivery workflows.

name: StaySpot
desc: Full-stack listing and booking-style web application with end-to-end UI flows, listing management, and production-style deployment setup.

name: Emotion Classification App
desc: AI-powered emotion detection app that classifies user text into interpretable emotional categories through an interactive web interface.
